inputs.label: Property Market Value
inputs.businessContext: The fair market value of the property.

label_i18n.es: Valor de mercado de la propiedad

businessContext_i18n.en: The fair market value of the property.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La juste valeur marchande du bien.
businessContext_i18n.es: El valor justo de mercado de la propiedad.

inputs.label: Assessment Ratio
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of market value used for tax assessment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of market value used for tax assessment.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Vergi değerlemesi için kullanılan piyasa değeri yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz des Marktwerts, der für die Steuerbewertung verwendet wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de la valeur vénale utilisé pour l'évaluation fiscale.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje del valor de mercado utilizado para la valoración fiscal.
businessContext_i18n.ar: النسبة المئوية من القيمة السوقية المستخدمة لتقييم الضريبة.

inputs.label: Mill Rate
inputs.businessContext: Tax per $1,000 of assessed value, expressed in mills.

businessContext_i18n.en: Tax per $1,000 of assessed value, expressed in mills.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Değerlendirilen değerin 1.000$'ı başına vergi, binde olarak ifade edilir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Steuer pro 1.000 € des Schätzwerts, angegeben in Promille.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Taxe par tranche de 1 000 $ de valeur évaluée, exprimée en mills.
businessContext_i18n.es: Impuesto por cada $1,000 del valor valorado, expresado en mills.
businessContext_i18n.ar: الضريبة لكل 1,000 دولار من القيمة المقدرة، معبرًا عنها بالميل.

inputs.label: Exemption Amount
inputs.businessContext: Total value of tax exemptions applied.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total value of tax exemptions applied.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Valeur totale des exonérations fiscales appliquées.
businessContext_i18n.es: Valor total de las exenciones fiscales aplicadas.
